description: 趙小七 — 「我就知道師兄最厲害」的得意表情。挺胸，雙手抱胸，下巴微抬。
prompt: anime style male cultivator, young man late teens, sky-blue themed disciple robes with cloud patterns, neat short black hair, smug proud expression with closed eyes and superior grin, arms crossed, chin slightly raised, sparkling aura around body, half-body portrait, transparent background, solid magenta #FF00FF background
